identity.role: Incoming Computer Engineering student · Technology-minded problem solver
intro: I am a technology-minded student about to begin a Computer Engineering degree, with practical experience delivering paid digital work to international clients. I bring [[strong working English, attention to detail and a patient, genuinely helpful approach]] to every role.
I am looking for responsible opportunities where I can contribute through digital skills, organisation, clear explanations and reliable follow-through.

rail.howIWork: Curious, patient and organised. I enjoy understanding how systems and ideas work, improving small details and explaining them clearly in a way that adapts to the needs and pace of others.
strengths: Clear, thoughtful communication in Spanish and English.
Patient and calm when helping others understand new ideas.
Reliable with timing, procedures, deadlines and follow-up.
Confident with technology, new systems and practical troubleshooting.

items.title: Computer Engineering degree · UNIE Universidad — starting in 2026
items.description: Upcoming university studies focused on software, computing systems and engineering foundations, while continuing to develop practical technical projects alongside my degree.

items.title: Cambridge English: C1 Advanced
items.description: Cambridge English Scale score: 179 · CEFR Level B2. Long-term experience with Cambridge English qualifications, from Pre A1 Starters and A1 Movers through to B1 Preliminary, B2 First and C1 Advanced.

items.title: Spanish Baccalaureate - Science and Technology
items.description: Completed upper-secondary education and the university entrance process at Colegio Sagrada Familia (SAFA), combining academic study with independent creative and technical projects.

workingStyle: Patient explanations adapted to different learning paces.
Care with procedures, accuracy and timing.
Quick learning with new systems and tools.

items.title: Digital projects & client delivery
items.description: Completed paid digital projects for international clients, independently managing **briefs, requirements, revisions, deadlines and final delivery**. The work combined creative and technology-focused tasks, digital media, web-oriented content and clear bilingual client communication.

items.title: Peer mediation programme
items.description: Selected as one of 3 students from a group of 70+ for the school's mediation programme. Completed additional after-school training with an external specialist, focused on **active listening, communication, mediation and conflict resolution**.

portfolio.main: See selected work, technical background and the projects I am building at {{amedina.dev}}.
portfolio.sub: Scan the QR code or visit the website to explore my digital work and professional background.
portfolio.label: Portfolio
